CustomField.description: DEBUG: Auto-generated Business Case Key for validation against Apex logic - Customer Code + Vendor + Technology
CustomField.formula: Customer_Code__c + "|" + LEFT(Vendor__c, FIND(" - ", Vendor__c + " - ") - 1) + "|" + LEFT(Technology__c, FIND(" - ", Technology__c + " - ") - 1) + "|" + TEXT(YEAR(Snapshot_Month__c)) + "-" + LPAD(TEXT(MONTH(Snapshot_Month__c)), 2, "0")
CustomField.label: Auto Business Case Key (DEBUG)
